defaultLocale.name: Picture-In-Picture

defaultLocale.name: Firefox Screenshots

defaultLocale.name: WebCompat Reporter
defaultLocale.description: Report site compatibility issues on webcompat.com

defaultLocale.name: Web Compatibility Interventions
defaultLocale.description: Urgent post-release fixes for web compatibility.

defaultLocale.name: System theme — auto
defaultLocale.description: Follow the operating system setting for buttons, menus, and windows.
defaultLocale.creator: Mozilla

defaultLocale.name: Light

defaultLocale.creator: Mozilla

defaultLocale.name: Dark
defaultLocale.description: A theme with a dark color scheme.
defaultLocale.creator: Mozilla

defaultLocale.name: Firefox Alpenglow
defaultLocale.description: Use a colorful appearance for buttons, menus, and windows.

defaultLocale.name: Ctrl+Number to switch tabs
defaultLocale.description: This extension adds keyboard shortcuts to switch tabs. Ctrl+1 switches to the first tab, Ctrl+2 switches to the second tab, and so on. Ctrl+9 switches to the last tab.
defaultLocale.creator: AbigailBuccaneer

defaultLocale.name: Ghostery Tracker Ad Blocker - Privacy AdBlock
defaultLocale.description: Ghostery is a powerful privacy extension. Block ads, stop trackers and speed up websites.
defaultLocale.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery Tracker Ad Blocker - Privacy AdBlock
locales.description: Ghostery is a powerful privacy extension. Block ads, stop trackers and speed up websites.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghosteryトラッカー＆広告ブロック - プライバシー広告ブロック
locales.description: Ghosteryは強力なプライバシー拡張機能です。広告をブロックし、トラッカーを阻止し、ウェブサイトを高速化します。
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery Bloqueur de Traqueurs et Publicités
locales.description: Ghostery est une puissante extension de protection de la vie privée. Bloquez les publicités, déjouez les outils de pistage et accélérez les sites Web.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: 고스터리 트래커 및 광고 차단기 - 프라이버시 AdBlock
locales.description: Ghostery는 강력한 개인정보 보호 확장 프로그램입니다. 광고와 트래커를 차단하고 웹 사이트의 속도를 높여줍니다.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery - Trình chặn quảng cáo bảo mật
locales.description: Ghostery là một tiện ích mở rộng quyền riêng tư mạnh mẽ. Chặn quảng cáo, dừng trình theo dõi và tăng tốc trang web.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery Blocco Annunci e Tracker - AdBlock
locales.description: Ghostery è una potente estensione per la protezione della privacy. Blocca pubblicità e tracker, e accelera i siti web.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery Tracker- & Werbeblocker | AdBlocker
locales.description: Ghostery ist eine leistungsstarke Datenschutz-Erweiterung. Damit können Sie Werbung blockieren, Tracker stoppen und Websites beschleunigen.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery 跟踪器和广告拦截器 - 隐私广告拦截器
locales.description: Ghostery 是强大的隐私保护扩展程序。拦截广告，停止跟踪器，提高网站速度。
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery блокировщик трекеров и рекламы
locales.description: Ghostery - это мощное расширение для обеспечения конфиденциальности. Блокируйте рекламу, отключайте средства слежения и ускоряйте загрузку веб-сайтов.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery Bloker Trackerów i Reklam - AdBlock
locales.description: Ghostery to potężne rozszerzenie do ochrony prywatności. Blokuje reklamy, wstrzymuje tropiciele i przyspiesza działanie stron internetowych.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery 追蹤器和廣告攔截器 - 隱私 AdBlock
locales.description: Ghostery是一個強效的隱私擴增功能。攔截廣告、制止追蹤器及加快網頁運行。
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery Bloqueador de Anuncios& Rastreadores
locales.description: Ghostery es una potente extensión para tu privacidad. Bloquea anuncios, detiene rastreadores y acelera sitios web.
locales.creator: Ghostery

locales.name: Ghostery Tracker & Ad Blocker - AdBlock
locales.description: O Ghostery é uma poderosa extensão de privacidade. Bloqueie anúncios, interrompa rastreadores e acelere sites.
locales.creator: Ghostery

defaultLocale.name: Unhook - Remove YouTube Recommended & Shorts
defaultLocale.description: Hide YouTube related videos, shorts, comments, suggestions wall, homepage recommendations, trending, and other distractions.
defaultLocale.creator: Unhook

defaultLocale.name: Vimium
defaultLocale.description: The Hacker's Browser. Vimium provides keyboard shortcuts for navigation and control in the spirit of Vim.
